feed.title: Korean Nuclear Energy Researcher Network
feed.subtitle: Welcome to Korean Nuclear Energy Researcher Network website.

entry.title: Seminar 3
entry.content: The thrid seminar was held at MIT PSFC where Dr. Inwoo Song (Commonwealth Fusion Systems) gave a talk on developments and industry trends in nuclear fusion energy. The seminar was followed by a discussion on key challenges and future directions for fusion technology development in Korea.
entry.summary: The thrid seminar was held at MIT PSFC where Dr. Inwoo Song (Commonwealth Fusion Systems) gave a talk on developments and industry trends in nuclear fusion energy. The seminar was followed by a discussion on key challenges and future directions for fusion technology development in Korea.

entry.title: 2026 Deep Tech Connect
entry.content: The members of Korean Nuclear Energy Researcher Network participated in 2025 Deep Tech Connect. Through this gathering, we fostered meaningful conversations among researchers in the same field while also creating new connections with scientists from other disciplines and exploring opportunities for future collaboration.
entry.summary: The members of Korean Nuclear Energy Researcher Network participated in 2025 Deep Tech Connect. Through this gathering, we fostered meaningful conversations among researchers in the same field while also creating new connections with scientists from other disciplines and exploring opportunities for future collaboration.

entry.title: Seminar 2
entry.content: The second seminar was held at the Consulate General of the Republic of Korea in Boston and professor Youho Lee (Seoul National University) gave a seminar on the development and qualification of accident tolerant fuels.
entry.summary: The second seminar was held at the Consulate General of the Republic of Korea in Boston and professor Youho Lee (Seoul National University) gave a seminar on the development and qualification of accident tolerant fuels.

entry.title: Seminar 1
entry.content: The first seminar was held at MIT PSFC where professor Sung Joong Kim (Hanyang University) gave a seminar on the development and recent trends of small modular reactors (SMRs).
entry.summary: The first seminar was held at MIT PSFC where professor Sung Joong Kim (Hanyang University) gave a seminar on the development and recent trends of small modular reactors (SMRs).
